entities.name: Document
entities.context: Represents a structured data entity in the YAML knowledge system.

entities.name: #contents
entities.context: Represents the content nodes in a Document.

entities.name: #directives
entities.context: Refers to stream directives within a Document.

entities.name: #errors
entities.context: Represents error handling in the Document.

entities.name: #warnings
entities.context: Represents warnings associated with Document processing.

entities.name: parseAllDocuments
entities.context: Function to parse multiple documents from a string.

entities.name: parseDocument
entities.context: Function to parse a single document from a string.

entities.name: isDocument
entities.context: Function to identify whether a certain node is a Document.
